title: NEET PG 2026 Preparation Strategy: An Evidence-Based Study Plan
description: A complete, evidence-based preparation strategy for NEET PG 2026 using active recall, spaced repetition, and the FSRS algorithm. Built by a medical student, for medical students.
author: OpenMedQ Team

title: The Science of Spaced Repetition: Why It Works for Medical Students
description: Understand the cognitive science behind spaced repetition and how the FSRS algorithm helps medical students retain clinical knowledge more efficiently than traditional study methods.
author: OpenMedQ Team

title: Why OpenMedQ Is 100% Free (And Always Will Be)
description: The story behind OpenMedQ: why a 3rd year medical student built a free, open-source medical exam preparation platform and how it stays free without ads or paywalls.
author: OpenMedQ Team
